parties_involved: VENDOR 1: Shri Banshilal Sahu son of late Parasram Sahu, age 58, resident of village Shankardah, Dhamtari, Chhattisgarh (PAN: DZNPS0541H)
VENDOR 2: Shri Manohar Lal Sahu son of late Parasram Sahu, age 55, resident of village Shankardah, Dhamtari, Chhattisgarh (PAN: DZMPS951Q)
PURCHASER: Azim Premji Educational Trust, registered under the Indian Trust Act 1882, represented by authorized representative K. Vijaykumar, Bangalore (PAN: AADTA4367R)
property_details: Location: Village Shankardah, P.H. No. 19, R.I. Circle Bhothli, Tehsil and District Dhamtari, Chhattisgarh
Type: Unirrigated Dhanha Single Crop land
North Boundary: Khasra No. 347 (Kachru s/o Shobhit)
East Boundary: Khasra No. 345/1 (Bhagat Ram), 345/2 (Ved Prakash), and 338/1 (Government land)
key_dates: 24-11-2011: Advance payment of Rs. 3,00,000 via SBI checks
07-03-2012: Execution of sale deed and balance payment of Rs. 43,37,500 via HDFC checks
13-03-2012: Verification by Treasury Officer and purchase of stamp papers
14-03-2012: Registration of the document at Sub-Registrar office, Dhamtari
summary: This Sale Deed records the transfer of agricultural land in Village Shankardah, Dhamtari, from Shri Banshilal Sahu and Shri Manohar Lal Sahu to the Azim Premji Educational Trust. The property, identified as Khasra No. 376/1 with an area of 1.06 hectares, was sold for a total consideration of Rs. 46,37,500. The sellers acquired the property through inheritance from their late father, Parasram Sahu, and declared it free from all encumbrances, mortgages, and legal disputes. An advance of Rs. 3,00,000 was paid in November 2011, and the remaining balance of Rs. 43,37,500 was settled via HDFC Bank checks in March 2012. The document confirms that physical possession of the unirrigated Dhanha land has been handed over to the purchaser. The deed was formally executed and registered in March 2012 at the Sub-Registrar's office in Dhamtari, Chhattisgarh, with all stamp duties and registration fees paid.
